# Portable sas-schema dependencies.
# Goal: a single `pip install -r requirements.txt` works on Python 3.8 (the
# stated portability floor) AND on newer interpreters. The environment markers
# below cap pandas/numpy to their last 3.8-compatible lines only on 3.8, and
# let newer Pythons take current releases. pyreadstat ships manylinux wheels
# that still support 3.8, so it needs only a sane floor.

pyreadstat>=1.1.0

# pandas 2.1+ requires Python >=3.9; 2.0.x is the last line that runs on 3.8.
pandas>=1.5,<2.1; python_version < "3.9"
pandas>=1.5;      python_version >= "3.9"

# numpy 1.25+ dropped Python 3.8; 1.24.x is the last 3.8-compatible line.
numpy>=1.21,<1.25; python_version < "3.9"
numpy>=1.21;       python_version >= "3.9"
